descriptions: Eastman Gang may have developed from Short Tails, indicating a possible predecessor relationship.
edges.evidence_quote: Another gang of the era, the Short Tails, had its headquarters in this same area, and the Eastman gang may have developed from that group.

descriptions: The Hook Gang had a rivalry with the Short Tails.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Patsy Conroy Gang , Short Tails

descriptions: Dinastía Alayón es una facción del Tren de Aragua.
edges.evidence_quote: Megaoperativo Virgo 2023 desarticula la facción del Tren de Aragua denominada como 'Dinastía Alayón'

'Ndrina Gentile.description: The 'Ndrina Gentile is a 'Ndrangheta clan based in Amantea, Calabria, Italy. It engages in extortion, drug trafficking, and usury. The clan has been involved in political corruption, with members arrested for vote-buying. Its assets have been seized in multiple operations, including the 2007 Nepetia operation.

descriptions: 'Ndrina Gentile is a subunit of the 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: La 'ndrina Gentile è una cosca malavitosa o 'ndrina della 'ndrangheta calabrese originaria di Amantea.

descriptions: 'Ndrina Gentile is part of the joint criminal group Gentile-Besaldo.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 3 gennaio 2009 sono stati sequestrai alle cosche Gentile-Besaldo 5 negozi, un ristorante e un terreno dal valore di 1 milione di euro.

descriptions: 814 was in conflict with Splash Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: The group was reported to be in conflict with Splash Gang (SG)

descriptions: 814 is an offshoot group from Ghetto Boys.
edges.evidence_quote: an offshoot group from the Ghetto Boys, known as 814

descriptions: Latella 'ndrina allied with Audino in 2013 to control construction.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2013, investigations discovered that the Latella 'ndrina, together with the Rosmini, Serraino, Audino, and Nicolò 'ndrine, formed an alliance to control the construction sector

descriptions: Ciampà is part of the Ciampà-Megna-Cazzato group.
edges.evidence_quote: Ciampà-Megna-Cazzato

descriptions: Megna is part of the Ciampà-Megna-Cazzato group.
edges.evidence_quote: Ciampà-Megna-Cazzato

descriptions: A Marauders member allegedly killed a Hell's Lovers member, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Luther Vaughn Jr., a member of the St. Louis chapter of the Hell's Lovers, was shot and killed at the Jets Clubhouse Lounge, a nightclub in East St. Louis, on March 31, 1985, apparently by a member of the rival Marauders motorcycle club.

Wah Ching.description: Chinese American criminal organization and street gang founded in San Francisco, California in 1964. Involved in narcotics, racketeering, gambling, and other illegal activities. Known for the 1977 Golden Dragon Massacre and conflicts with rival gangs. Active primarily in the San Francisco Bay Area and Greater Los Angeles.

descriptions: 14K has connections to Wah Ching.
edges.evidence_quote: The 14K has had connections to the leadership of the Ping On triad in Boston and Wah Ching in San Francisco.

descriptions: Asian Boyz and Wah Ching are in a long conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Many members of the Asian Boyz have been in a long conflict with the Wah Ching gang.

descriptions: Wah Ching is listed as an ally of the Black Dragons in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Wah Ching , Vietnamese Boyz Gang, Oriental Lazy Boyz , Asian Boyz , Hop Sing Tong, United Bamboo Triad, 14k Triad

descriptions: After the Golden Dragon massacre, Wah Ching drove the Hop Sing out of San Francisco.
edges.evidence_quote: In the wake of the 1977 shooting, the Wah Ching were ascendant and the Hop Sing were chased out of San Francisco.

descriptions: Founders were former Wah Ching members who defected to Wo Hop To, indicating a past affiliation with Wah Ching.
edges.evidence_quote: The Jackson Street Boys was founded by three brothers, Bobby Tsan, Johnny Tsan and Tommy Tsan, who were former Wah Ching members who had defected to the Wo Hop To after the Wo Hop To forced the Wah Ching out of San Francisco.

descriptions: The Joe Boys and Wah Ching were engaged in a violent war.
edges.evidence_quote: By 1973, the struggle between the Chung Ching Yee and the Wah Ching had erupted into a war that had claimed 13 lives since 1969

descriptions: Infobox lists Wah Ching as a rival of Sun Yee On.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: 14K, Wah Ching, Wo Shing Wo

descriptions: TRG formed alliances with Wah Ching.
edges.evidence_quote: They have formed alliances with Chinese organizations such as the 14K , Wah Ching and Wo Hop To in California and the New York City -based Ghost Shadows .

descriptions: Wah Ching has strong associations with 14K triad.
edges.evidence_quote: There is law enforcement anecdotal evidence that suggests as a group the gang has developed strong associations with other Asian organized crime groups, such as the 14K and Sun Yee On triads in Hong Kong.

descriptions: Wah Ching has an ongoing conflict with Asian Boyz.
edges.evidence_quote: The Wah Ching Gang has an ongoing conflict with another rival Asian gang in Los Angeles, the Asian Boyz (ABZ)

descriptions: Infobox lists Bamboo Union as a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Asian Boyz, Bamboo Union, Black Dragons, Chung Ching Yee, Wo Hop To

descriptions: Infobox lists Black Dragons as a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Asian Boyz, Bamboo Union, Black Dragons, Chung Ching Yee, Wo Hop To

descriptions: A side of Wah Ching is affiliated with the Bloods.
edges.evidence_quote: Flip-Side (FS-23) – A purported side of the Wah Ching composed mainly of Filipinos, Flip-Side was believed to be the side of Wah Ching that was affiliated the with Bloods.

descriptions: Infobox lists Hop Sing Tong as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: 14K, Hop Sing Tong, Suey Sing Tong, Sun Yee On, Tiny Rascal Gang, Bloods

descriptions: The Wah Ching were absorbed into the Hop Sing Tong.
edges.evidence_quote: By approximately 1968, the Wah Ching were absorbed into the Hop Sing Tong

descriptions: Both are examples of Chinese American street gangs with connections to tongs and triads, but no direct relationship is stated.
edges.evidence_quote: Examples of such street gangs include the Joe Boys and Jackson Street Boys, which are named after the major street of San Francisco's Chinatown.

descriptions: Wah Ching was involved in the Golden Dragon Massacre with the Joe Boys.
edges.evidence_quote: Wah Ching first received widespread media attention because of the 1977 Golden Dragon Massacre (GDM) involving another Chinese gang, the Chung Ching Yee, or Joe Boys (JBS).

descriptions: Infobox lists Chung Ching Yee as a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Asian Boyz, Bamboo Union, Black Dragons, Chung Ching Yee, Wo Hop To

descriptions: Wah Ching has strong associations with Sun Yee On triad.
edges.evidence_quote: There is law enforcement anecdotal evidence that suggests as a group the gang has developed strong associations with other Asian organized crime groups, such as the 14K and Sun Yee On triads in Hong Kong.

descriptions: Infobox lists Tiny Rascal Gang as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: 14K, Hop Sing Tong, Suey Sing Tong, Sun Yee On, Tiny Rascal Gang, Bloods

descriptions: Wo Hop To killed Wah Ching's leader, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1991, Danny "Ah Pai" Wong, the leader of Wah Ching, was shot and killed by Wo Hop To (WHT) hitmen from Seattle Chinatown.

descriptions: Infobox lists Wo Hop To as a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Asian Boyz, Bamboo Union, Black Dragons, Chung Ching Yee, Wo Hop To

descriptions: The Yau Lai split from the Wah Ching.
edges.evidence_quote: The Yau Lai (also known as the Yo Le or Yau Lay, meaning 'good fortune') split from the Wah Ching in 1969

descriptions: Wo Hop To forced Wah Ching out of San Francisco, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: The Jackson Street Boys was founded by three brothers, Bobby Tsan, Johnny Tsan and Tommy Tsan, who were former Wah Ching members who had defected to the Wo Hop To after the Wo Hop To forced the Wah Ching out of San Francisco.

descriptions: The two groups were in a violent power struggle in San Francisco.
edges.evidence_quote: At about the same time, the Wah Ching and Wo Hop To were struggling for power in San Francisco.

descriptions: Wo Hop To chased Wah Ching out of the Bay Area, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Wo Hop To chased the Wah Ching gang out of the Bay Area and the Wah Ching headed to Southern California.

descriptions: Infobox lists Wah Ching as a rival of Wo Hop To.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Wah Ching

Straight Satans Motorcycle Club.description: The Straight Satans Motorcycle Club was a one-percenter outlaw motorcycle gang based in Southern California, founded in July 1959 by three bikers known as Father Bill, Little Jerry, and Glick. It was among the earliest outlaw motorcycle clubs in the Los Angeles area, but remained localized without chapters beyond its original base. The club gained notoriety for its association with the Manson Family during the late 1960s, particularly around the Tate–LaBianca murders. It was implicated in criminal incidents including a sexual assault in 1972.

descriptions: Manson Family hired Straight Satans members for security at Spahn Ranch.
edges.evidence_quote: Manson brought in members of the Straight Satans Motorcycle Club to act as security.

descriptions: Mongols, Hells Angels, Straight Satans, and Glendale Night Riders jointly committed a sexual assault in 1972.
edges.evidence_quote: Members of the Glendale Mongols chapter, along with bikers from the San Bernardino chapter of the Hells Angels, the Straight Satans of Venice, and the Glendale Night Riders, committed a sexual assault on a fifteen-year-old girl in August 1972.

descriptions: The Straight Satans had a close association with the Manson Family, with members visiting Spahn Ranch and providing weapons.
edges.evidence_quote: The Straight Satans are perhaps most infamous for their connection to the Manson Family cult.

descriptions: Members of the Straight Satans and Mongols were jointly implicated in a criminal incident.
edges.evidence_quote: In August 1972, members of several Southern California motorcycle gangs—including the Straight Satans, the Glendale chapter of the Mongols, the San Bernardino chapter of the Hells Angels, and Night Riders from Glendale—were implicated in the sexual assault of a 15-year-old girl.

descriptions: Ang Soon Tong attacked Gi Leng Hor, causing a death.
edges.evidence_quote: Sagar Suppiah Retnam, the headman of Ang Soon Tong in Jurong, led 14 gang members to attack a rival gang, Gi Leng Hor, in Marsiling in December 1990.

descriptions: C-Notes were an early rival of the Gaylords.
edges.evidence_quote: Among their earliest rivals were the C-Notes, Lazy Gents, and Playboys.

descriptions: The C-Notes are listed as an ally of the Chicago Outfit in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: C-Notes

descriptions: Jousters were part of UFO alliance with C-Notes.
edges.evidence_quote: In about 1973 an official alliance called UFO (United Five Organisation) was formed among several north side white gangs, including Gaylords, Jousters, Playboys, C-Notes and Ventures.

Sergi 'ndrina.description: The Sergi 'ndrina is a clan of the 'Ndrangheta, a mafia-type organization in Calabria, Italy. Based in Platì, it emerged in the 1970s as a branch of the Barbaro 'ndrina. The clan is heavily involved in drug trafficking, money laundering, arms trafficking, extortion, corruption, and murder, with operations in northern Italy, Rome, and Australia. It has been one of the most dominant 'Ndrangheta groups in northern Italy, particularly in Corsico and Buccinasco.

descriptions: The Barbaro are allied with the Sergi in Australia.
edges.evidence_quote: In Australia sono alleati con i Sergi

descriptions: Sergi 'ndrina is an ally of Barbaro 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Sergi 'ndrina

descriptions: Barbaro 'ndrina is associated through blood relations with Sergi 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: Many of the 'Ndrangheta clans in Platì, such as Trimboli, Sergi, Romeo, Zappia, Papalia and Marando are associated through blood relations, which center around the Barbaro.

descriptions: The Cataldo, Marando, and Sergi jointly managed a drug trafficking operation.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 20 maggio 2008 vengono eseguite 48 ordinanze di custodia cautelare ad affiliati alle 'ndrine dei Cataldo, Marando e Sergi che gestivano un traffico di droga.

descriptions: Infobox lists Sergi 'ndrina as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Marafioti 'ndrina, De Stefano 'ndrina , Sergi 'ndrina and Marando 'ndrina

descriptions: Marando collaborates with Sergi in drug trafficking in Milan.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel nord Italia si trovano nella zona sud di Milano in collaborazione con i Sergi e i Papalia con i quali si occupano del traffico di cocaina e eroina

descriptions: The Papalia are allied with the Sergi.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleati dei Barbaro , dei Sergi , dei Trimboli , tutti originari di Platì .

descriptions: The Papalia and Sergi met to negotiate control of heroin and reached an agreement to avoid conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel 1985 in uno scantinato di via Lamarmora a Milano si svolse un incontro tra i Sergi e i Papalia per il controllo dell' eroina . Partecipò all'incontro anche Domenico Papalia che riuscì a portare le due 'ndrine a un accordo ed evitare la faida.

descriptions: Papalia 'ndrina is allied with Sergi 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: and is allied with the Sergi , and Trimboli 'ndrine

descriptions: Papalia 'ndrina is allied with Sergi 'ndrina per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Barbaro 'ndrina , Sergi 'ndrina , Trimboli 'ndrina , Molluso 'ndrina , South American drug cartels

edges.evidence_quote: Hanno alleanze con le 'ndrine originarie di Platì come i Barbaro , i Papalia e i Sergi

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Barbaro 'ndrina , Papalia 'ndrina , Sergi 'ndrina , Trimboli 'ndrina , South American drug cartels

edges.evidence_quote: in collaboration with the Papalia and Marando 'ndrine, with whom they are involved in the trafficking of cocaine and heroin

edges.evidence_quote: The Misurasata movement split in 1983, with the breakaway Misura group of Stedman Fagoth Muller

'Ndrina Carpino.description: The Carpino are a 'ndrina of the 'Ndrangheta operating in the municipalities of Petronà, Cerva, Sersale and the Levante area. They are also active in Liguria, in the province of Genoa, in the municipalities of Chiavari and Lavagna. The group has been involved in a feud in Petronà since the 1990s, with numerous attacks and murders. In 2014, assets worth 2 million euros were seized from an alleged affiliate.

descriptions: Carpino is listed as an ally of Arena in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Alleati: Carpino, Costanzo, Dragone, Gaglianesi, Mannolo, Trapasso

descriptions: Bubbo and Carpino were in a feud (faida) in the 1990s.
edges.evidence_quote: scoppia una faida nella pre-sila catanzarese tra i Bubbo e i Carpino

descriptions: The Carpino are a 'ndrina (sub-unit) of the 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: I Carpino sono una 'ndrina della 'ndrangheta

descriptions: The Bubbo attacked members of the Carpino in 1993.
edges.evidence_quote: Alfredo Covelli e Salvatore Carpino subiscono un attentato da parte dei Bubbo

descriptions: The Carpino killed two alleged affiliates of the Tratraculo cosca in 2006.
edges.evidence_quote: vengono uccisi i fratelli Ettore e Angelo Talarico presunti affiliati alla cosca "Tratraculo"

descriptions: Death Riders is a puppet club of the Hells Angels.
edges.evidence_quote: the Hells Angels and their Rockers and Death Riders puppet clubs

descriptions: The Sanghera Crime Family is listed as an ally of the Red Scorpions in the infobox.

descriptions: Clan Moccia had a feud with Clan Natale over drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Secondo alcune fonti il clan Moccia, non avendo sviluppato il redditizio traffico di droga, avrebbe provocato una faida con il clan Natale

descriptions: The Black Mob is a tribe (subgroup) of the Latin Kings.
edges.evidence_quote: In December 2019, 17 members and associates of the Black Mob, the largest Latin Kings 'tribe' in the New York area, were charged with racketeering offenses...

descriptions: TAK is a rival to PKK, damaging its ceasefire efforts.
edges.evidence_quote: The TAK is a rival to PKK that since 2006 repeatedly damaged the PKK's efforts to negotiate cease-fires and unlike the PKK, is seeking to establish independent Kurdistan.

Primeiro Comando da Capital.description: Brazilian organized crime syndicate founded in 1993 by eight prisoners at Taubaté Penitentiary. Based in São Paulo, it is Latin America's largest drug gang with 40,000 lifetime members and 60,000 contractors. Active throughout South America, West Africa, and Europe, it controls over 50% of Brazil's drug exports to Europe and has a partnership with the 'Ndrangheta. Known for a business model favoring quiet market expansion over violent turf wars.

descriptions: 'Ndrangheta and PCC formed an alliance for cocaine trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: an alliance between various 'ndrine clans and the Primeiro Comando da Capital since the mid-2010s has increased the mafia's presence in the country

descriptions: Primeiro Comando da Capital is listed as a rival of Bala na Cara in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivais: Primeiro Comando da Capital , Os Manos , V7 , FMV

descriptions: Bonde do Maluco is allied with the PCC.

edges.evidence_quote: O grupo criminoso é aliado da facção criminosa Primeiro Comando da Capital (PCC).

descriptions: Bonde dos 13 is allied with PCC.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: PCC

descriptions: After breaking alliance, Bonde dos 40 and PCC are in conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Until 2017, it was an ally of the Primeiro Comando da Capital, but they broke with their former allies in Teresina, sparking an intense war.

descriptions: B40 was allied with PCC until 2017, then broke and started a war.
edges.evidence_quote: Até 2017 eram aliados á facção paulista PCC . no entanto, romperam com a facção em Teresina, causando uma guerra intensa que dura até hoje.

edges.evidence_quote: Rivais: PCC , CV

descriptions: Bonde dos 40 was allied with PCC until 2017, then broke and went to war.
edges.evidence_quote: Until 2017, it was an ally of the Primeiro Comando da Capital, but they broke with their former allies in Teresina, sparking an intense war.

descriptions: CCA maintains close relations with PCC.
edges.evidence_quote: O grupo surgiu por volta de 2018 e mantém relações próximas com o PCC

descriptions: Comando Vermelho has fought in conflicts with PCC.
edges.evidence_quote: It has fought in several small-scale conflicts with rival gangs such as Primeiro Comando da Capital (PCC)

descriptions: A 20-year truce between CV and PCC broke down in 2016, leading to violent clashes.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2016, a 20-year truce between the Primeiro Comando da Capital (PCC), a rival organization based in São Paulo, and the CV broke down, sparking violent clashes.

descriptions: CV and PCC were in conflict, with the war starting in 2016.
edges.evidence_quote: Between 2015 and 2018, the Familia do Norte and the Comando Vermelho (CV) formed an alliance to prevent the advance of the Primeiro Comando da Capital (PCC) in Amazonas, generating the War between the PCC and CV in 2016

descriptions: Comando Vermelho is in turf wars with Primeiro Comando da Capital.

descriptions: The text states they are the two largest criminal organizations in Brazil, but does not assert a cooperative or conflictual relationship between them; they are simply co-mentioned as major groups.
edges.evidence_quote: Comando Vermelho Rogério Lemgruber ( CVRL ), mais conhecido como Comando Vermelho ( CV ), é uma das duas maiores organizações criminosas do Brasil , ao lado do Primeiro Comando da Capital (PCC).

descriptions: Primeiro Comando da Capital is listed as an ally of CJNG in infobox.

descriptions: FDN and PCC had conflicts that led to a war in 2016.

descriptions: Família Terror do Amapá is allied with PCC.
edges.evidence_quote: sendo frequentemente alvo de operações de segurança devido à sua expansão e aliança com facções nacionais como o PCC

descriptions: GDE left the alliance with PCC after a leadership coup.
edges.evidence_quote: Porém, a G.D.E deixa a aliança com o PCC após um golpe na liderança da comunidade do Sossego na capital cearense, Fortaleza.

descriptions: PCC listed as rival of GDE in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivais: CV , PCC , Massa Carcerária

descriptions: PCC lists BDM as an ally in infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: O conflito entre facções criminosas brasileiras de 2016–2020 foram uma série de confrontos entre organizações criminosas do país divididas em dois lados em fins da década de 2010. Os confrontos têm sido encabeçados por Primeiro Comando da Capital (PCC) e Comando Vermelho (CV), em lados opostos

Grim Reapers Motorcycle Club (Canada).description: Canadian outlaw motorcycle club founded in 1967 in Calgary, Alberta. Active from the 1960s to 1997, it became a dominant club in Alberta alongside the Rebels, Warlords, and King's Crew. In 1997, the club was patched over into the Hells Angels. Members were involved in drug trafficking, murder, and other crimes.

descriptions: The Grim Reapers merged into Hells Angels via a patch-over in 1997.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1997, the club became part of the Hells Angels in a patch-over ceremony held in Red Deer, Alberta.

descriptions: Grim Reapers were patched over into Hells Angels in 1997.
edges.evidence_quote: when the Grim Reapers became part of the Hells Angels in a patch-over ceremony held in Red Deer, Alberta

descriptions: The text states the Grim Reapers have alleged ties to the KKK.
edges.evidence_quote: The Grim Reapers are ... have alleged ties to the Ku Klux Klan (KKK)

descriptions: Grim Reapers members murdered the president of the Outcasts Motorcycle Club.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1970, 11 members and 2 associates were sentenced to life in prison for the murder of Ronald Hartley, president of the Outcasts Motorcycle Club.

descriptions: The text states the Grim Reapers are allied with the Outlaws.
edges.evidence_quote: The Grim Reapers are allied with the Outlaws

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Grim Reapers

edges.evidence_quote: Throughout the 1970s the Rebels had multiple violent exchanges with their main rivals in the province- the Grim Reapers Motorcycle Club.

descriptions: Satan's Choice met with Grim Reapers to form an alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: In the summer of 1989, a group of Satan's Choice bikers led by Guindon and Campbell visited the Prairie provinces, meeting with the leaders of los Bravos gang of Winnipeg and the Grim Reapers in Calgary and Lethbridge to form alliances.

descriptions: Los Bravos patched over to become Hells Angels chapter.

edges.evidence_quote: form an alliance with los Bravos biker gang

descriptions: The Ferrera clan was allied with the Laudani clan and thus supported the Catania faction of Cursoti.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel 1991 scoppiò una violenta faida, che vide contrapposti da un lato i Cursoti catanesi, guidati da Giuseppe Garozzo e da Santo Mazzei e appoggiati dal clan Laudani (e quindi dai Santapaola , Ferrera, Ercolano e dai Malpassoti ), e dall’altro i milanesi, facenti capo a Jimmy Miano e supportati dal clan Cappello

'Ndrina Pelle.description: The 'Ndrina Pelle, also known as Pelle-Vottari, is a 'ndrina (mafia clan) of the 'Ndrangheta based in San Luca, Calabria, Italy. It is one of the most influential 'ndrine, with members serving in advisory and top bodies of the organization, particularly in the Ionian mandate and the province. The clan is active in international cocaine trafficking, contract rigging, extortion, and has been documented influencing regional election campaigns.

descriptions: Pelle 'ndrina is a constituent family of the 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: the Pelle 'ndrina, from San Luca, named after Antonio Pelle;

descriptions: Marianna Barbaro is married to Giuseppe Pelle, linking the Barbaro and Pelle clans through marriage.
edges.evidence_quote: Marianna Barbaro (1967), figlia di Francesco, è la moglie di Giuseppe Pelle

descriptions: Pelle 'ndrina is an ally of Barbaro 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Pelle 'ndrina

descriptions: Barbaro 'ndrina formed a tight alliance with Pelle 'ndrina through marriage.
edges.evidence_quote: One of his daughters married Giuseppe Pelle , one of the four sons of Antonio Pelle , the 'Ndrangheta boss from San Luca , securing a tight alliance between the two powerful 'ndrine .

edges.evidence_quote: Giuseppe Vottari, known as "U massaru" or "capobastone", allied with the Nirta clan since the early seventies.

descriptions: War between Pelle-Romeo and Strangio-Nirta clans, resulting in deaths.
edges.evidence_quote: A war between the two 'Ndrangheta clans Pelle-Romeo (Pelle-Vottari) and Strangio-Nirta from San Luca that had started in 1991 in their home town in Calabria and resulted in several deaths, spilled into Germany in 2007; six men were shot dead in front of an Italian restaurant in Duisburg on 15 August 2007.

North Side Gang.description: The North Side Gang was a multi-ethnic criminal organization in Chicago during Prohibition, active from the early 1920s to the mid-1930s. It was the principal rival of the Chicago Outfit led by Al Capone. Founded by Dean O'Banion and Hymie Weiss, the gang controlled bootlegging, gambling, and robbery on Chicago's North Side. The gang was largely defunct by 1935 after a series of violent conflicts.

descriptions: Al Capone's Mafia family massacred the North Side Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: In Chicago, Al Capone and his family massacred the North Side Gang, another Irish-American outfit.

descriptions: Al Capone's family massacred the North Side Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: En Chicago, Al Capone y su familia masacró a la North Side Gang , otra organización irlandesa estadounidense.

descriptions: The North Side Gang is listed as a rival of the Chicago Outfit in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: North Side Gang

descriptions: The North Side Gang was rivaled by the Chicago Outfit during Prohibition.
edges.evidence_quote: However, they would soon be rivaled by Italian mobsters, particularly Al Capone and the Chicago Outfit.

descriptions: North Side Gang was the principal rival of the South Side Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: It was the principal rival of the South Side Gang , later known as the Chicago Outfit or Chicago Mafia

descriptions: North Side Gang had Chicago Outfit as rivals.

descriptions: North Side Gang had Genna crime family as rivals.

Escritório do Crime.description: Brazilian militia of elite hitmen operating in the west zone of Rio de Janeiro, founded in 2007. It originated from illegal real estate activities such as land grabbing, construction, and illegal sale and rental of properties, with its main activity being contract killings. The group is composed of military police officers and former police, commanded by former BOPE captain Adriano Nóbrega and PM major Ronald Paulo Alves Pereira. It is suspected of involvement in 19 unsolved homicides since 2002, including the assassination of councilwoman Marielle Franco.

Patriarca crime family.description: Italian-American Mafia crime family operating in New England, with factions in Providence, Rhode Island and Boston, Massachusetts. Founded around 1916 by Gaspare Messina, it was led by Raymond Patriarca from 1954 to 1984. The family engages in illegal gambling, loansharking, extortion, and other rackets. As of 2024, it has approximately 30 made members.

descriptions: The New England family is part of the Commission at various times.
edges.evidence_quote: the leaders of other families, such as New England

descriptions: The Patriarca family and the Winter Hill Gang are portrayed as enemies in a bloody feud.
edges.evidence_quote: The Patriarca crime family is considered an important part of the plot of the 2015 biopic crime film Black Mass, as they are considered the main enemies of the Winter Hill Gang, led by the bloodthirsty James 'Whitey' Bulger.

descriptions: Paul Weadick was an associate of both organizations, indicating a cooperative link.
edges.evidence_quote: Weadick was affiliated with both the Patriarca family and the Winter Hill Gang.

descriptions: Nicolo Giso acted as a liaison between the Patriarca family and the Winter Hill Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Giso also served as a liaison between Patriarca underboss Gennaro Angiulo and the Winter Hill Gang.

descriptions: The Patriarca family and the Winter Hill Gang jointly operated a cocaine and marijuana venture.
edges.evidence_quote: he was dispatched to resolve a dispute with the drug dealer George Pappas, who had defrauded a joint cocaine and marijuana venture operated by the Patriarca family and the Winter Hill Gang.

descriptions: Listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Patriarca crime family

descriptions: Philadelphia boss George Borgesi formed an alliance with the Patriarca crime family's underboss.
edges.evidence_quote: Since his release from prison, Borgesi has traveled to Rhode Island forming an alliance with Patriarca crime family underboss Matthew Guglielmetti.

descriptions: Both families are described as the most dysfunctional, but no direct relationship is stated.
edges.evidence_quote: The crime reporter George Anastasia has described the organization as one of the two most dysfunctional Mafia families in the United States, along with the Patriarca crime family of New England.

descriptions: Robert Luisi Jr. moved from Patriarca family to Philadelphia family, showing a transfer of membership.
edges.evidence_quote: Originally an associate of the Patriarca crime family, he joined the Philadelphia mob and became inducted in 1998.

descriptions: Winter Hill Gang's informant led to imprisonment of Patriarca crime family underboss.
edges.evidence_quote: He used this position to eliminate competition and consolidate power within the city of Boston which led to the imprisonment of several senior organized crime figures including Gennaro Angiulo, underboss of the Patriarca crime family.

descriptions: Infobx lists Patriarca crime family as rivals (specifically Angiulo brothers).
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Patriarca crime family (specifically the Angiulo brothers)

descriptions: Winter Hill Gang partnered with Patriarca crime family for gambling rackets.
edges.evidence_quote: the Winter Hill Gang entered into a partnership with the Patriarca crime family of Providence, Rhode Island to control gambling rackets in Boston

descriptions: Stephen Flemmi served as a liaison between the Winter Hill Gang and the Patriarca family, indicating a cooperative relationship.
edges.evidence_quote: Flemmi acted as the Winter Hill Gang's liaison to the Patriarca family.

descriptions: Stephen Flemmi was affiliated with both, indicating a cooperative relationship between the two organizations.
edges.evidence_quote: He was affiliated with the Patriarca crime family and the Winter Hill Gang.
